badge.unavailableTooltip: Could not load license status (missing permission or server error).

expired.label: EXPIRED
expired.tooltip: License expired — please renew. Payment creation may be blocked.

demo.label: DEMO
demo.tooltip: Demo user account — data may be non-production or limited.

devExport.label: DEV / EXPORT
devExport.tooltip: OpenAPI export mode — no real license setup.

superAdminMode.label: Super Admin mode — full control
superAdminMode.tooltip: Platform administration. Tenant licenses are managed under Tenants; the server deployment license is not shown here.

tenant.baseTooltip: License of the active tenant (company). The admin UI itself has no license restriction.

expired.label: Tenant license: EXPIRED
expired.tooltip: The tenant license has expired — please renew.

warning.title: License expiring soon
warning.message: Your license expires in {{days}} day(s). Please renew in time to avoid payment outages.
warning.messageWithDate: Your license expires in {{days}} day(s) ({{date}}). Please renew in time.

expired.title: License expired
expired.message: Payment creation is blocked. Please contact support to renew the license.
expired.messageWithDate: Expired on {{date}}. Payment creation is blocked — please contact support.

floatingWarning: Note: The last activation used no offline certificate (JWT). For a floating license, no device fingerprint is required; share the hash only for machine-bound licenses.

activation.title: Activate license
activation.successSimple: License activated successfully. Your system is now fully operational.
activation.failureSimple: License invalid or expired. Please check your license key.
activation.noPermission: No permission to activate (settings manage required).

simpleUi.subtitlePublic: Same essentials as on the POS app.

activationHistory.title: Activation history (API audit)
activationHistory.subtitle: Every activation attempt against this server (success and failure). Enter the full REGK key for key filtering (not the masked list value).
activationHistory.forceDeactivateConfirm: Remove the active device binding in the database and mark this audit row as revoked?

reports.scheduledEmailHint: Optional: scheduled emails via `License:ReportEmail` and `Email:Smtp` (weekly summary; expiry notices at 30/15/7 days). Recipients: `LicenseReportRecipients` or `LicenseReminderRecipients`. JWT is never exported.
reports.dateRangeIssuedAt: Issued date (UTC; filters `issued_at_utc` and activation attempts)
reports.maskLicenseKeys: Mask license keys (recommended; full REGK only for careful backups)
reports.exportLicenseGated: Bulk export requires license features admin_license_manage and admin_rksv.

generation.title: Generate license
generation.expiryDateHelp: Last valid day (interpreted by the server as 23:59 UTC).
generation.requireFingerprintHelp: If enabled, the license is only valid on the specified machine.
generation.unavailable: License generation is not enabled on this server (signing key missing).
generation.noPermission: No permission to generate (settings manage required).
generation.featureNotIncluded: This server's license does not include license management (admin_license_manage). Activate an appropriate license first.
generation.expiryInPast: The expiry date cannot be in the past.
generation.invalidMachineHash: Enter a valid 64-character SHA-256 hex fingerprint.

result.title: Generated license
result.warning: These values are shown only once. Hand them to the customer securely.
result.posDeepLinkHelp: Opens the cash register app with a prefilled activation JWT (cashregister:// scheme). Works only if the app registers this URL scheme.

issued.title: Issued licenses
issued.empty: No licenses issued or no matching rows.
issued.revokeConfirmDescription: The license will be marked as revoked. Clients using this key may stop validating as licensed.
issued.renewExpiryHelp: Calendar day (YYYY-MM-DD); server uses end-of-day 23:59 UTC. Must be in the future.
issued.renewSuccess: License renewed. New key and JWT are shown.
issued.renewResultWarning: The previous key is revoked. Hand these values to the customer securely.

upgrade.newExpiryHelp: Must be after the stored expiry. Calendar day (YYYY-MM-DD); the server uses end of that day at 23:59 UTC.
upgrade.pickAfterExpiry: Please choose a date after the current expiry.
upgrade.resultWarning: Hand these values to the customer securely — they are only shown here.
upgrade.reActivateNotice: The customer must re-activate the POS with the new offline JWT.

super.extendNeedPositive: Enter a positive number of days and/or months.
super.extendResultHelp: The license key stays the same; expiry and JWT were updated.
super.superRevokeBody: SuperAdmin action: the row will be marked revoked (blocked).
super.cancelBody: Terminal cancellation: this row cannot be reactivated.
super.deleteBody: Soft delete: hidden from the list; audit trail remains.
super.unregisterBody: License becomes floating; activations for this key are cleared; a new JWT is issued.
super.fullKeyHint: Full key is only shown in this detail view.

dashboard.sectionSubtitle: Issued-license metrics, activation trend, and latest events (audit + activations).
dashboard.chartEmpty: No activations in the selected window.
dashboard.loadFailed: Could not load the license dashboard.

supportNotice: Enter your license key. If you need help, contact support@regkasse.at

publicStatus.title: Public license status (API, POS view)
publicStatus.subtitle: Source: GET /api/license/status — same contract as the POS client.
publicStatus.loadError: Could not load public license status.
